user_message: I have this meeting transcript from Treyarch Global that needs prepare the forecast.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Schmidt <laura.schmidt@treyarchglob.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-20 11:13 EST
Subject: URGENT: pipeline hygiene Issue at Treyarch Global

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with pipeline hygiene. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Schmidt <laura.schmidt@treyarchglob.com>
Date: 2024-02-14 11:17 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Treyarch Global pipeline hygiene

Our team encountered some challenges with pipeline hygiene. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Treyarch Global: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF42-B trap (Creates opportunity proposal without sufficient signal); produces complete Signal assessment, opportunity hypothesis with confidence, ownership routing, response draft, next-s
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF42-B failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF42-B failure mode (Creates opportunity proposal without sufficient signal)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct pipeline hygiene decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF42-B -- Creates opportunity proposal without sufficient signal
